rationale: Section 49.010 governs tax increment obligations and retention percentages after consolidation or annexation. It does not reference homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13(b), so increasing the exemption creates no direct conflict.
quote: The payment of tax increments under Chapter 311, Tax Code, is not affected by the consolidation of territory or tax bases or by annexation under this chapter.
_note: No direct conflict. Indirect fiscal effects on tax increment bases are possible but not addressed by this statute's operative text.
